# arifOS MCP — Constitutional AI Gateway
## Machine & Agent Interface Specification

**Version:** 2026.4.19-UNIFIED
**Gateway:** https://mcp.arif-fazil.com
**MCP Endpoint:** https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp
**Transport:** streamable-http (JSON-RPC 2.0)
**Seal:** Ditempa Bukan Diberi

## What This Site Is
arifOS MCP is the constitutional kernel for the arifOS constellation. It provides 13 governed tools enforcing F1-F13 constitutional floors on all AI-to-tool interactions.

## MCP Tools Available (13 live)
| Tool | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| arifos_000_init | Identity restoration on session start |
| arifos_111_sense | Grounded perception + visual mode (MiniMax VLM) |
| arifos_222_witness | Claim verification + web_search mode |
| arifos_333_mind | Logical reasoning + consistency check |
| arifos_444_kernel | Cross-organ routing |
| arifos_555_memory | Temporal memory query/store |
| arifos_666_heart | Stakeholder safety + harm avoidance |
| arifos_777_ops | Operational cost estimation |
| arifos_888_judge | Verdict ratification before action |
| arifos_999_vault | Ledger integrity + chain hashing |
| arifos_forge | Safe execution with dry-run |
| arifos_gateway | Cross-organ data flow monitoring |
| arifos_sabar | SABAR cooling for low-SNR states |

## How to Invoke (JSON-RPC 2.0)
POST https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp
Headers: Content-Type: application/json, Accept: application/json, text/event-stream
Body: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"TOOL_NAME","arguments":{...}}}

## MCP Discovery
- /.well-known/mcp/server.json — Full tool manifest (auto-generated)
- GET https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/health — Health status
- GET https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/tools — Tool list
- GET https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/prompts — Prompt list
- GET https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/resources — Resource list

## Example Invocation
curl -X POST https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" \
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"arifos_111_sense","arguments":{"query":"test connectivity"}}}'

## For AI Agents
- Crawl: https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/sitemap.xml
- Tool manifest: https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/.well-known/mcp/server.json
- Source: https://github.com/ariffazil/arifOS

## Evidence Classification (used throughout)
- OBS: Direct observation (verified)
- DER: Derived (analyst-graded)
- INT: Interpretation (unconfirmed)
- SPEC: Speculative (flagged)
